reviews.review_text: Excellent, good position by the sea, everything what you need, clean and convenient. We are lucky and happy.
Great park great town, worth the journey to get here.

We stayed 10 days to break our trip as we were tired of setting and and closing down the caravan. It was  a great break. We had a great site, and I made good use of the oven in the newer camp kitchen. The other in the old camp kitchen needs attention or replacement as it keeps going out. The bathrooms were adequate and cleaned with care each day.
Nice small park. We had a great powered site with plenty of room, ground mat and grass kept things tidy. Shower block neat and clean and friendly staff.
Lovely little park with clean and modern facilities.
Nice, small, well maintained park, clean amenities, close enough to ride to town or along the coast on the cycleway.

Very clean and tidy room. Kitchen is well-equipped, toaster, microwave oven, stove, oven and even nespresso coffee maker. Outside is laundry room. Two supermarkets at the end of street. Few lovely cafe and restaurants there as well. We love our stay here.
schöne Wohnung

Ally is so kind! She welcome us and was very lovely.
Also the park is clean the toilets and it’s near from everything !

Tiny park close to everything
Very clean
Friendly staff
Great spot

The accomodation is good value for money for the region. It is tidy and has everything commonly needed.
Unfortunately,  our room felt a little cold (during summer), as where we stayed didn't get much sun.

Small, but with safety concerns

The campsite is small and well maintained. However, there are no gates and many signs warning about theft, so you always need to keep your car locked. The entrances and exits are also very narrow and unclear, which almost led to a collision with another vehicle.
Nice caravan park friendly staff clean toilets and camp kitchen

I had a family get together in esperance there was 14 adults and 20 kids it was alot to deal with and the staff at the holiday park where very nice and helped make it as easy as they can and on top of that i ended up having to take my puppy and they were very helpfull.
Cabins where very looked after would highly recomend staying there

Great place to stay.
Very clean and management are fantastic.

Small park with a mix of chalets and campsites. The facilities are very clean and well maintained. There are two camp kitchens, one is fully enclosed and one is open air. Other features include a children’s playground, TV lounge and laundry. There are grassy sites and some have shade. Staff were outstandingly friendly and helpful. The park is conveniently located close to the waterfront and the town centre. The only negative aspect is the proximity to a major road and the port which is quite noisy.

Small camping but cosy vibes and excellent facilties. Two camp kitchens, showers and toilets have older design tiles but are functional, clean and well maintained. Also good water pressure. Overal great little camping
Friendly caretakers, good size powered sites, clean ablution block, good showers, well kept gardens and grass, well appointed camp kitchen
Great caravan park, friendly staff & close to everything in town
Great location, small park, immaculate bathrooms and very well equipped camp kitchens. We have stayed there twice and will be back when we go back to Esperance.
We were there for a very short overnight stay 5pm until 7 am , but we were greeted in a friendly and helpful style, and were very pleased with the facilities

Small park with a mix of chalets and campsites. The facilities are very clean and well maintained. There are two camp kitchens, one is fully enclosed and one is open air. Other features include a children’s playground, TV lounge and laundry. There are grassy sites and some have shade. Staff were outstandingly friendly and helpful. The park is conveniently located close to the waterfront and the town centre. The only negative aspect is the proximity to a major road and the port which is quite noisy.
This park is great. Cozy little cabin with 2 bedrooms. All the kitchen facilities and utensils to complete home cooked meals. Location is really good. Park employees are all friendly and very helpful

Service:
Cold and unwelcoming. Staff offered an 11:00 am check-in, so I arrived at 11:15. The first thing I was told was that I shouldn’t be there yet. When I said I’d come back later, they then said it was fine since I was already there. The interaction was confusing and quite unpleasant.

Campground & location:
Location is mixed. It’s conveniently close to town, but the campground sits right next to a highway retaining wall. It is loud, regardless of what you may be told.

Amenities & camp kitchen:
Both the amenities block and camp kitchens are run down and filthy. The second, smaller camp kitchen appears unsafe and, in my opinion, should be closed until issues are addressed.

Campsites & overall vibe:
Sites are tight, poorly maintained, and the general atmosphere is negative and dirty

Perfect caravan park close to shops and beach very friendly and helpful staff if you are planning a trip to Esperance i would highly recommend to have a stay great prices and amenities spot on and clean thank you for the plesent stay at your park
Wonderful stay. Friendly staff

Stayed here in the cabins for a week with the whole family and it was a great experience. It wasn’t busy which meant we got away from the busy usual parks and got to just enjoy it. Staff were super friendly and also checked in when my daughter was unwell. Everything was very clean and well maintained. Would happily stay here again when we are back next
One of the best great caravan park
Enjoyed this caravan park. Lovely spot for a walk. Cabin was clean and well equipped. Facilities good and service was lovely.

Gut organisiert und das auf engem Raum.
Der Grill mit 2 Edelstahl Plancha's war schnell auf Temperatur und nach dem Grillen gut zu reinigen. Die Outdor Küche hat alles was benötigt wird.
Bei Fragen war Park Manager Chris sehr hilfsbereit mit vielen nützlichen Tipps.

Insgesamt zu empfehlen.
Only drawback was poor wifi eventhough it is offered.
I really recommend this caravan park for your stay, staff really kind and helpful, the amenities are great and clean.
Great little quiet park and very friendly staff. Amenities very clean and tidy.

Ally was awesome getting us in with short notice and adding an extra night to the 3 we had booked. We also got an early check-in as well. Nothing was too hard.
We loved this little park. It's close to town. Clean amenities and 2 camp kitchens and laundries.

Very quiet park, apsolute spotless toilets and showers, full of freindly people from all over ozz, got Aurelia's cafe across the rd with great coffee, pies, breaky wraps, ice cream everything made in store.
Great spot
small c caravan park bit tight to manoeuvre vans but very clean and tidy. ammenites good. staff friendly and helpful.

Lovely Small Caravan Park in a great location.   Kudos to Chris, the Manager, she keeps this park lovely.   You know it is good when you walk into the amenities, or laundry.
Highly recommend this for CP.   Small is Clean and Good and sites are large.
We loved our stay. Very clean chalet, friendly staff.

This was an absolutely lovely stay in a small, quiet and well maintained park. The cabin was spotlessly clean as were the camp kitchen and amenities. Everything was provided in the comfortable cabin,  comfortable bed, good little verandah with table and chairs. Loved the large screen TV in the lounge room as we have stayed in a few too many places where the small TV is located at ceiling height.  Located conveniently close to the waterfront and to town so we could walk there. Would definitely recommend this place.
Super friendly and cheerful staff, from reception to the cleaning team. Everything is spotless and the kitchen is fully equipped – nothing is missing. Highly recommended!
Clean and friendly staff

This is a small park which is good. It is very clean and quiet with good amenities. Some bays are a little hard to access with a big van but all in all a great place to stay in Esperance and close to shopping.  Esperance is also a great place to visit with lots of things to do and see.

So sadly I didn't take many photos,  however,  because I stuffed up my booking I thought we were out of luck,  but the awesome lady at reception made an effort to juggle things around to fix my mistake... legend! The park itself was small,  clean, had all types of sites and cabins,  lovely staff and patrons,  a proactive attitude,  and a great location tucked in at the end of the central part of town.  Only a few meters from the port and a beach and a shop with great food and iceream. We didn't want for anything.  As a traveller I love accommodation that's good bang for buck and often seek "old but good" as it usually means I get more space,  less fancy but value for money.  I originally booked one of their new style cabins but sure to my lack of calendar skills ended up changing to the older cabin to get accommodated for the night.  Please note... this was a me problem lol! Anyway we scored the"old but good" situation. Winning! It slept 4 ppl, had all the amenities,  big bathroom,  kitchen,  had stove,  aircon,  heating,  full size fridge and so on... my failure / problem turned out in our favour.  It was cheaper and great to sleep in.  Just loved it and wanted to share the story, as the staff made a bad situation into a great stay! Thankyou
Great clean park
Kelly was friendly and helpful and facilities were clean and well maintained.  Enjoyed our stay.
We stayed one night on an unpowered space and everything went well. Clean amenities, the receptionist is super kind and friendly. Thank you!
The staff were very friendly and even turned on the electric blanket for me in advance, which was really thoughtful. Highly recommended!

We were welcomed by a very happy and smiling Chris. Great little park, tidy and well kept. Well stocked camp kitchen for those that need it, cleaned every day.Location was great.
Will be back. Left on a joke from Chris

È un buon campeggio con piazzole ordinate e curate. I bagni sono puliti e in ordine su una struttura chiusa senza spifferi (cosa utilissima in inverno).
La posizione non è felicissima: da un lato il campeggio è a ridosso della strada sopraelevata e a noi è capitato una piazzola proprio a ridosso di questa...
Nice location, clean facilities and friendly staff. Sites are quite small.
Stayed power site for 5 nights.Lovely park.Staff very friendlyGreat location.Ameneties so cleanGreat Park.Glenice Les.

The cabins are clean and comfy with full facilities. Great!!
I booked for 2 nights camping as well , I do not have a caravan so rely on camp kitchens. It poured rain and unfortunately camp kitchen was 3 inches of water throughout, could not get to fridge
or stove!
When I bought to their attention they immediately cleared the drains but my shoes were already wet!!
The TV room is freezing with no heater and smells mildew and damp!

In fair weather camp kitchen would be good facilities but open to wind and cold no
Blinds or walks on ocean side during winter!

Love the location and price is fab! But camp kitchen  some work to make it fair for campers!

We stayed at a powered site for 3 nights. The caravan park is generally kept clean which was nice. ||The amenities are in desperate need of an upgrade, no dryers in the laundry so you need to hope for sunshine.||The real major downside was the traffic noise (cars hooning up the overpass which backs onto the side of the park and also the noise of the train which goes to the port. ||Nice walk to the beach and parks and not far from the cafes and bars.
Lovely gate keeper. Excellent service and information provided. Well done  . Had a great stay. Not a bad place to visit ✅
Great park,large sites,amenities clean and was quite considering the closeness of main road

Stayed here on our travels into WA, ladies at the front desk were so lovely and welcoming. Was super easy to book on their website at such a great deal. We were also super lucky to extend our stay on more night in our cosy cabin last minute, the ladies made it so easy to do. It was in such a convenient spot as well close to the beach views, we have no faults and we will most certainly be excited to stay here again the cabin was beautiful. Also thankful for their recommendations in the area to visit such ad the twilight beach and making the area feel so welcmomes to us. We will most certainly be back!
Well placed caravan park. Easy access to beach and esplanade. Very good facilities.
Didn't see the rooms as I was in my own RV. Lady at the reception was super friendly on my arrival, my sitexwas perfect & amenities clean & well kept
Small park but comfortable and clean. Staff lovely!

Nice small park, tidy, close to everything, Esplanade within walking distance. Amenities a little run down but very clean & tidy, nice staff. A good base for exploring Esperance and the surrounding areas. Well priced.

Welcomed by lovely lady when checking in.  Facilities were spotless. Great camp kitchen.  It’s not a huge park so everything is close.   Really enjoyed our stay here.
We had a powered site.
Clean and complete, good shower, comfortable bed. Recommended!
Clean comfortable self contained cabins. Quiet location. Close to foreshore.
Must stop for travellers
Lovely small park with everything you need.  Close to foreshore and centre of town.

Great place to stay, accomodation very clean and all staff easy to deal with.
Site very central to town centre and foreshore Stayed 14 to 16 May 2025 and really enjoyed our stay in Esperance
Would definitely stay there again.  Excellent service and great customer service. Highly recommended.

Really enjoyed our stay. Cabin was great and good location, Park Manager eas great too, super helpful. Would recommend for those who don't want to stay with millions of kids and prefer a smaller, quieter stay.
Clean well-kept and well equipped caravan park.  Quiet also - although it’s centrally located you can’t hear any surrounding roads. Would stay again

On our trip to Esperance we were staying at another local campsite but the facilities were in a horrendous state so we called around and luckily we called Esperance Bay Holiday Park as they could not have been more helpful.

The manager on the reception desk whose name I never managed to catch allowed us to come over and use their shower facilities for free and then again the second day for which we paid for. We would just like to say again just how helpful and accommodating the manager was to people that were not even customers of her own campsite.

We thank you so much for your help and kindness.

Jack & Katie
Hired the Powered site without ensuite, toilets were cleaned, staff was very professional. Got discounted price without even asked and at the last minute easter time. Cant beat that.

My partner and I are traveling with our rooftop tent and booked an unpowered site. There are only a couple of them and they’re really small. In the middle of the night, you can hear your neighbors snoring. The kitchen is very small and outdated, you’re sleeping right under the highway, and there isn’t even a single tree nearby.
Had a nice powered site under a tree for shade.   You do get some noise and dust from the nearby port and railway. Handy walking distance to town centre.
It’s a lovely caravan park in a great location.  Nice walk along the Esplanade and town centre is walking distance.

Studio room I was in does not have a toilet or shower. It is very old and poorly maintained. The bed is very uncomfortable and the shared amenities were dirty.
The people the run the park are very confused and hard to talk to for bookings. We were with a group and said we had not booked enough rooms, yet the itinerary showed everyone in our group had a room. It took a while to get this across to the lady.

I would not recommend this place, even for back packers. I

It is also overpriced for what they have and what you get.

As you replied for me to talk to the booking agency. I have done this and it is their policy to not book accommodation without private amenities like a toilet and shower. They were not informed by the Holiday park the it was a shared ammenities.

So one of these are not being truthful and I know I have never had a problem with our booking agency in the past, who book travel for us all over Australia.
Can't fault the place, we've stayed there twice now and had a great time both times. The location is great, the staff is friendly and the cabins are clean and tidy.

Plätze werden doppelt gebucht. Wir hatten einen Platz für 3 Nächte gebucht, als wir am letzten Abend zurück gekommen sind, war unser komplettes Campingequipment auf die Strasse gestellt und es.waren andere Gäste auf unserem bezahlten Platz.
Wir mussten dann Abends (Rezeption war schon geschlossen) herumtelefonieren. Es kam dann jemand, der komplette Platz war angeblich ausgebucht, obwohl noch Plätze frei waren, haben wir nur einen Notplatz direkt an der Wand zur Strasse bekommen. Offizielle war dies aber kein Platz.
Es wurde uns dann zugesichert dass wir die Gebühr für diese eine Nacht erstattet bekommen, leider ist das bis zum heutigen Tag nicht passiert. Auf mehrfache Anfragen per Mail bekommen wir keine Antwort. Es ist Lug & Betrug dieser Platz. Sehr traurig wie man mit ausländischen Touristen umgeht. Wir fahren sicher wieder nach Australien, nie wieder auf diesen Platz. Es gibt bessere und andere Plätze im Ort.

We are in the accommodation business and do the best we can for our guests. Working with Ally on short notice to accommodate us was a pleasure. Awesome place to stay, clean facilities.
5 stars for you Ally
Nice and clean

Very well looked after park. It is not a large park, but the managers use the space they have very well. Very well resourced park. As well as the standard things like a laundry and BBQs, you also have access to things like a toaster, washing up detergent and an oven.
Rooms had everything I needed the bed was super hard and the rate they clean your rooms is a bit to long
Arrived on site to lovely hot showers and cleaned bathrooms. Thank you!

My friends and I stayed at Esperance Bay Holiday Park in the studio cabin. On first arrival there were a few small issues with the cabin but the staff were very understanding, kind and cooperative in addressing the issues. The staff took my concerns seriously and the issues were resolved quickly. I’d happily stay there again. Supreme service and high standards. Would highly recommend
Staff were super friendly and helpful, bathrooms were clean and well looked after, unpowered sites didn’t have much shade which was roasting in summer
Great Park. Staff are exceptionally friendly and helpful. Small grounds although well laid out in a  perfect location. Has everything you need to see you have a great stay.

Dsappointing Stay - Avoid and Go Elsewhere .
The location is the only positive thing about this place. Unfortunately, the room was not clean, and both BBQs on the property were marked ‘Out of Service,’ leaving us unable to prepare our own meals. This forced us to dine at the tavern down the road.

To make matters worse, the maintenance staff was extremely rude and lacked basic manners. Such behavior is unacceptable and leaves a terrible impression.

Overall, it was an unpleasant experience. I would not recommend staying here, look for better options elsewhere .

Doesn't get better than these Chalets.
Walk to beach and a pub feed.
Perfect

Lovely caravan park. We booked a powered site and everything was good.
Shower and toilet clean. Location nice, not to far away from the beaches, but you need a car to get there
Price a bit salty in my opinion $65

Mattresses are appalling. Very uncomfortable. Linen is about 15 years old, stained and very thin. Severe water damage in bathroom coming through wall and floor to master bedroom. Bathroom constantly leaking water 24/7. Washing machines $5 per load!!!!
Well equipped. Bed a bit uncomfortable . Very friendly staff and welcome.  Quiet location.
Nice grassy campsites, toilets and facilities are lovely and suited for the number of people at peak season.

Staff are incredibly friendly and accommodating, Dylan in particular was fantastic. The rooms are clean and comfortable. And the location is fantastic, very close to all the nice beaches and everything you need in town. Couldn't have asked for a better place to stay.
Easy check in great location on the seafront, cleanandtidy. Close to restaurants
There was a dear i my room
Good facilities whole complex is quite small however its got what it needs and most are well maintained. Would recommend staying here.

Small, quiet park,  facilities lovely and clean. We were within easy walking distance to town centre and just across the road from the foreshore which was fantastic for walking our dogs. We would definitely stay again.
Excellent location. Nice size caravan park.
We stayed 4 nights. Beautiful facilities. We didn’t require power but no option for that. We were very close to the busy road and it was noisy. Bit of a walk into town but that was good for us!
Great place to stay as a couple or with family & friends.

This is not a hotel, it is a caravan park with cabins. We stayed 4 nights in our van and were impressed with the facilities and location. Note, there are no drive through sites and spots are very close together. I had help from the park manager to reverse into my site. The park is dog friend and has a small play area for kids is close to shopping and the beach which has a skatepark, adventure playground, basketball courts and is great to  walk along with lots of sculptures and points of interest.

Best place to stay when you're traveling is camping. The place has great facilities and amazing staff who make it a great stay. The other caravan parks can be a bit disappointing, but you get a good deal here. I'd definitely stay here again if I'm ever back in esperance.
Great amenities and located opposite the foreshore walk into town

Nice campsite! Some spots are side to side, others are a little more private since there are trees in between. The beach is very close and the amenities are good. There is no drinking water since it’s inside the national park but you can boil the tap water to make it safe! There is firewood for 20 Dollars and some steel fire pits that can be carried to your side (there are not enough for everyone but there is also a fixed public one)!
Best caravan park in our around Australia trip. Superior facilities, clean and neat as you can get. First class park.

Perfect location to take in all the attractions of Esperance
At the end of the road
Warm welcome with lots of tips on where to go
Two bedroom cabin was perfect!
Very clean
Caravan Park is friendly,  busy, and fun. Central to town and the local sights.

Great position. Very clean facilities. Incredibly helpful and friendly managers & staff. I needed to get to the airport to get a hire car. Enquired about taxis and they gave me a lift instead! Quality people!!
Good clean rooms with everything you need, close to good restaurants and  the Esplanade walk. Very helpful people at the front desk.
A lovely caravan park. Sites were more spacious than most we have experienced. Clean and friendly.
Lovely people run this park and are very helpful. Loved our stay here and wouldn't hesitate in staying again. Esperance in general is very relaxed.

Fab place to say for a few days. We had a powered site as we camping/backpacking round australia. Right on the beach. Good location. The facilities were spotless and update modern kitchen, shower rooms. Lovely pool overall brilliant.

Great place. Clean, Was what was needed.
Not much sugar and coffee provided. I could have asked for more but it was a crazy time.
Good park

Pristine cleanliness with amazing bathroom facilities. Great powered camp spot for a campervan.|We stayed just the one night but this park has everything you need for families and couples. Range of accommodation options. Even a list of local dog minders!

The cleanliness could use some serious improvements. Bed sheets and pillow case were not fresh and smelled from body odor.

Rooms were ok and location was good.
Lovely small park,  friendly people.

Schöner, kleiner Campingplatz in der Nähe vom Meer. Die Stellplätze waren ausreichend groß und die Sanitäranlagen in Ordnung.
Sehr nettes Personal!
We had an amazing stay here. It's only a small park but the staff are so lovely and helpful. It's a short walk to the esplanade and the facilities are great.
Small caravan park with great facilities. Walking distance to shops and beach front.
Great and friendly staff.  Close to beach and eateries. Would definitely come back again.
Fabulous location. Clean cabin. Great parking available. Friendly and helpful customer service.

Busy park close to harbour. Very clean amenities. Camp kitchen and TV room comfortable. Lovely reception staff.
Good position for day trips.

Overpriced, underwhelming.
Wifi signal in room is so weak that it will keep disconnecting and it's really frustrating if you're a digital nomad or trying to book your next room. Rooms are cold, especially the bathroom. It costs $9 to use the wahser and dryer, and extra for detergent & pegs. Feels a bit gougy. On the plus side there's a fully outfitted kitchen & an electric bed.

Check in very simple with lots of good local advice & tips. Appreciated.

Mixtures of sites & cabins. Site was under a tree, with hard stand for van & concrete slab adjacent for seating. Road in was a deadend & pretty narrow, so took a bit of reversing to get it right.

A couple of secure amenity blocks in park. Ours had a good laundry (card operated washing & coin drier) with clothes lines. Amenities were great - lots of hot water, & good pressure.

Multiple exits from park. 2 to back & 1 to foreshore area. Only a 10min walk from park to town.

Foreshore side of Park was a bit noisy - some passing traffic & beeping (I assume from Port area).

Overall a good stay.

Very friendly  and helpful staff, the entire campgrounds were clean with very well maintained grounds, only a short walk to everything. My site was huge, just got lucky I guess. Esperance has so much to offer the traveller and a great springboard to visit the fabulous lucky bay in cape grand National park
Тихое место - спать хорошо , посуда требует отмывки
Lovely park. Standard of amenities and camp kitchen are second to none. Reception staff very helpful and friendly.

Had a lovely holiday here at Easter. It is a small park but has all the facilities you’d need and a brilliant location. 2min walk from the beach and all the play parks, mini train, and mini golf there. We had a family unit which seemed quite new and was very well appointed. Friends had chosen a cheaper cabin which was extremely dated, kitchen was quite small, and did not have a toilet so you had to use the camping ablutions.
There’s a tv room, kids play ground, and laundry facilities. Overall was a good place in a great spot with lovely staff!

Sites are way too small we have an 8ft mh with a slide out and a small car which we tell everyone when we book.  Our friends have a van no slide out and had a great site.The amenities had mold  in the showers easily cleaned off.  Also one of the staff totally rude when I mentioned to our friends we had nowhere to park our car.  He overheard and told me to go stay somewhere else!!!
We stayed in a heritage cabin for a change. Very clean and comfortable. Short walk to beach and a little further to the shops. Make sure you go up to the lookout (Dempster head). Beautiful coastline.

The accommodation is a good size with everything you need. It was very clean and nice and quiet at night. It is easy to walk in to the town and we'll placed to get to the beaches and sights in the area. There are good pay laundry machines on site. Worth staying
Nice and helpful staff. The cabin was definitely good enough for a campsite. The bathroom was alright too. Can't really complain about anything. Appreciate the help from the staff.

EDIT: the owner has responded to my review in an attempt to invalidate my experience rather than address their failings and do better for future guests. I can assure you, the below review is an accurate and recent account of my stay at the RAC Esperance Bay Holiday Park. Our sites were located alongside the barrier fence, adjacent to the camp kitchen. These 3x dirt 'sites' running alongside the barrier fence would best be described as the verge of the road. Imagine paying $50 per night, per site, to camp in the dirt on the verge of the road with a 7 month old baby and every attempt to address the issue with the staff / owner is blatantly dismissed. Very disappointing experience.

REVIEW: Paid $50 a night to camp on a tiny, dirt patch squeezed between the road and the barrier fence. The site we paid for shouldn't even be a site, it is the verge of the road. Absolute price-gouging!

There were plenty of larger, grassed sites available during our stay for the exact same price. Including 2 directly across the road from us. We asked if we could move sites and were told we could not. So for 3 nights we camped on the verge of the road, in the dirt, with a 7 month old baby while looking across the road at the VACANT greener pastures on the other side.

The facilities (shower/toilet block, camp kitchen) are newly renovated and nice. But it does not make up for the price-gouging and absolutely terrible customer service. The staff here literally do not care at all.

Overall, probably one of the worst experiences I've had camping in a caravan park in WA. Would not return.
Absolutely absurd, location doesn’t matter if there is no service and hygiene.
Great place clean bathroom very good service

You can try your luck with this holiday park if you want to sleep right beside an outdoor aircon unit and be awaken all night due to the crazy noise for several nights after all the tiredness of driving 700km from Perth. I’m sure this is my first and last time.🙃

Our challet was the perfect place for our week in Esperance, the property was well maintained and exceeded our expectations for space, safety and comfort. Centrally located and we really liked that we could park in front of our challet. Highly recommend.

Not welcoming and helpful at all!
Try to speak with them and the only word i got was "you can't come here"

What a pleasure to stay at this caravan park.We stayed 3 nights and loved it and Esperance.The park is clean,well maintained and close to everything. Facilities are very good with well equipped camp kitchens and all services are available here.Would highly recommend.

Booked a site 6 months ago, drove for 10 hours and arrived to find that we didn't have a site suitable for our caravan. Upon a quick inspection, there were 3 empty sites suitable, however we were told unfortunately we couldn't stay and to try our luck at the local (expensive $60pn with no power) showgrounds. Absolutely gobsmacked and devastated.
Stayed for 5 nights in December at a powered site. Great site, great location, nice amenities. Would stay again.
Great location, centrally located with a short walk to parks and attractions.

Good friendly holiday park with good clean facilities in a nice area.
Some issues/errors with my booking and prior communication regarding my after hours arrival, but it was sorted out promptly when I arrived after calling the after hours number on the reception door, so all good.
Would stay here again.
Sehr gut, sehr nettes Personal, sehr guter Wasserdruck in der Dusche. Gutes Internet
Loved our stay here. Really nice lady at reception very friendly and helpful. Lovely clean bathrooms and showers with codes so we felt very safe. Lovely clean kitchen area. I would deffo recommend.

We stayed here for a week and it is a lovely quiet park.The bathroom facilities are spotlessly clean and the park is well maintained. The staff are very friendly and approachable. I definitely recommend staying here
We had a fabulous week at this camp. Cannot fault anything. A shout out to the housekeeping,  very clean and comfy. Recommend this to anyone, couples or families.
Quiet and tidy cabin. Had full kitchen equipment for self catering. Would stay again

Clean and tidy 1 bed cabin. All you you need in kitchen as we cooked for ourselves for the night. Bed comfy. Ensuite clean and tidy. About 15 min walk to Main St area. Very quiet. Friendly staff on reception. Easy parking outside the cabin.
Walking distance to everything.  Nice park and good service.  Will stay again for sure!
Advertises pet friendly and then declined my booking because I told them I had pets.

Location to town is a lovely stroll. The unpowered sites are next to the highway wall and are not much wider than a supermarket parking bay. This was explained to us which is fair. The bathrooms are nice and clean, good hot powerful showers.

We stayed for 10 nights as my husband was working at the Port. The location was fabulous for me to venture to the beach, shops etc. The Park managers Craig and Debbie were lovely, Most of all a big thank you to Craig he finds the time to welcome everyone and makes them all feel special. So a big a big thank you to Craig and Debbie for your hospitality. Cheers Brett and Julie Miers

A wonderful park, it was clean, tidy and beautifully presented.
Deb and Craig were friendly and very helpful.

A really lovely place. Immaculately maintained and good facilities. The apartment was well appointed even down to the coffee machine and included pods. The only reason it’s not 5 stars was the disappointing mattress. It was such as shame and let down after a few weeks in motorhome we were looking forward to a really comparable bed. Ah well. Everything else was perfect.

We are here now with our 24' caravan and Bella the German Shepherd,  what a perfect  set up, could not be better....site no 8 in the corner, high colourbond fence on 2 sides, good size grass area no one walking through your site,  we use a stake and wire which she has alot of freedom with. used one side privacy screen to stop wind.
Apart from being so brilliant if you have a dog, the rest of the park toilets, campers kitchen showers people all excellent, and walking easy to beach shops, restaurants  and cafes.
Excellent clean camp facilities, helpful staff and in close walking distance to town.

Great value for money.
2 room accommodation for 4 adults was neat, tidy, and comfortable.
Lovely reception staff.

Good accomodation and close to all tourist  spots, esperance  tourist cbd and the ocean drive loop.

2 bedrooms one with double bed and one with single bed and one bunk bed. Kitchen &  lounge with cooking facilities, cutlery and aircon/heating and tv.

Parking front of accomodation

Very enjoyable stay. Park and facilities were super clean. Good location, able to walk into town and foreshore. Have a 22ft van and site was good size and enough space to manoeuvre around. Highly recommend.
Great place to stay that we came back for a few more days because it was so good, clean, helpful staff, good prices $25
The two young women were very friendly to give information for the stay.  Thank you so much.
Close to town. Small sites.
Amazing staff, and great location. However , floors were rather dusty, so slippers indoors were a must. Beds were comfortable and clean. Enjoyed my stay.
Very friendly unobtrusive staff and the accommodation we stayed in was comfortable and had everything we needed

We had a cottage. Really well appointed, clean and comfortable. Walking distance to Esplanade.
Laundry facilities, great.
We stayed in our caravan at Esperance holiday park, great location , clean facilities, a small caravan park , I would recommend this park

Our favorite place to stay when we visit Esperance! We love that the apartments modern and spacious just what a family needs! Unfortunately the beds are not very comfortable but still great value and we will definitely return!
Excellent service and great place to stay.
Lovely and clean pleasant staff would recommend.
Great little caravan park, clean and tidy, friendly service and they help you to get your van parked safely. Easy access to services and foreshore.
A great place to stay and recharge your batteries, the owner are lovely people with plenty of info on sites to see and things to do, highly recommended.
Clean,modern,spacious  units. All amenities  in tip top condition . Staff delightful especially the blond lady who cleans
A great place for a stay.
We stay here 2 nites. Great location 5 min walk to town. The beach at the back.  Very clean  lots of grass staff are great. And very friendly.  Wi-Fi is great.
Winter special being only $25per nite for caravan site well worth the stay, facilities are very clean, staff very friendly, would defently reccomend,  if staying book ahead. 😊
Good park with clean amenities

Nice lil 2 bedrooms chalet. We got everything we needed for 5 nights. A kitchenette with cutleries, lounge area and balcony. The bed was comfy It's really nice to have an electric blanket in our bedroom to keep us warm in winter nights. Heater was good too. 5 mins to the foreshore. We will definitely come back in the near future. Would be better to change some new cups and cutlery as some of them are old, stained and rusty.😊
Nice clean quiet park very friendly people close to Esplanade and beautiful beaches. Shops within a 5 minute walk. Would definitely stay again.

Great park extremely clean and well kept park. We stayed in a one bedroom  cabin which was super clean spacious a lovely hot shower and excellent kitchen if you want to cook for yourself walking distance to everything. All staff well presented and pleasnt Thanks for a great stay 🤗
Good value

Schöner Campingplatz- haben in der Off Saison 25$ power bezahlt 👍🏼 Saubere Bäder und schöne kleine Küche zum kochen. Vielleicht etwas zu klein, aber top.
Gute Lage direkt in der Innenstadt

Room was very clean and modern and the check-in person was very friendly. Park was quiet at night. It was pouring with rain for a lot of our stay but the room felt cosy and warm :). Was walking distance to a lot of shops and restaurants. Only suggestion would be that it would be great if you had an EV charger on site somewhere. The lady who checked us in gave us one location that she knew and asked me to let her know if we found any more (we found another at the Comfort Inn 15min walk up the road that let us use theirs for a small cost).

Lovely small caravan park... but we struck rain wind and hail here.. Park not to blame for the  weather but our site 13 seemed to need a bit of drainage.  But we had camper trailer and awning. Close to beach and shops.

Honestly the worst experience and worst customer service I have ever received. I actually am leaving because I don’t feel safe to stay there with my babies based on the awful treatment I received and the dirty looks I was getting after that. I really don’t know how they can remain open!
This place is fantastic clean n tidy great spot very comfy beds n very pleasant hosts

Great location, very tidy, clean facilities.
Walk to town centre. Nearby beach and jetty. Awesome daybreak views
Very clean, tidy and comfortable. Well located.
